resources.string: A shrimp\'s heart is located in its head.
Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins can—up to 40 minutes underwater.
The first footprints on the moon will likely stay there for at least a million years because there is no wind to blow them away.
Wombat poop is cube-shaped, which helps prevent it from rolling away and marks their territory more effectively.
Scotland has over 400 words for "snow," including "feefle" (swirling snow) and "flurrie" (a light dusting).
The Eiffel Tower can be 15 cm taller during the summer due to the thermal expansion of the iron in the heat.
